block_00: Find the best trades with Bollinger Bands
block_03: The Bollinger Bands is a versatile technical tool that can add flexibility and precision to your trading approach. By including this indicator in your technical analysis, you can:
block_04: Understand the trend direction: bullish or bearish;
block_05: Identify support and resistance levels to find the best entry and exit points;
block_06: Spot breakouts to catch important changes in the trend.
block_07: Learn how to set up this indicator and understand its signals in this article.
